description: Style NoteIf you're looking for a sport-inspired, casual tee which won't let you down in either style or performance, then your search is over! This t-shirt from nike has an ace print on the front, just what you need to perfect your effortlessly fashionable casual look.Product DetailsBlack T-shirt with an asymmetric neckline, has short sleeves, Nike swoosh on the right chest and rubber print at the nape of the t-shirtMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironSize and FitRegular fit
